title: Lakebase Autoscaling: Lakehouse Sync is now in Public Preview
body: Lakehouse Sync is now in Public Preview for Lakebase Autoscaling. Lakehouse Sync enables continuous, low-latency replication of your Lakebase Postgres tables into Unity Catalog managed Delta tables using Change Data Capture (CDC). See [Lakebase Change Data Feed](/aws/en/oltp/projects/lakebase-cdf).
